checks.leftCenterPuff: The left-center cloud puff isn't right.

drawScene.name: Draw the weather scene
drawScene.description: Create a weather scene with a yellow sun, a white cloud, and blue rain drops.

drawScene.name: Draw the weather scene
drawScene.description: Create the complete weather scene with sun, cloud, and rain.

cloudShape.question: How do I build the fluffy cloud shape from simple shapes?
cloudShape.answer: The cloud is one rectangle (already drawn for you as the base) with `circle`s placed along its top edge to give it the bumpy outline.

raindropShape.question: How do I make a raindrop with `ellipse`?
raindropShape.answer: Raindrops are tall and thin, so the vertical radius is bigger than the horizontal one. The horizontal radius is `3` (the one number not divisible by 5).

sunOnTop.question: Why is my sun showing on top of the cloud?
sunOnTop.answer: Shapes drawn later sit in front of earlier ones. Draw the sun first, then the cloud on top, so the cloud appears to be in front of the sun.

notMatchingTemplate.question: Why isn't my drawing matching the template lines?
notMatchingTemplate.answer: Your shapes should sit just inside the guide lines, not on top of them. Nearly every number you need is divisible by 5, so try the nearest multiple of 5 if a shape looks slightly off.

rectangle.description: Draw a rectangle at position (left, top) with the given width, height, and color

circle.description: Draw a circle centered at (centerX, centerY) with the given radius and color

ellipse.description: Draw an ellipse centered at (centerX, centerY) with horizontal radius radiusX, vertical radius radiusY, and color
